name: Unarmored Defense
mechanicalSummary: While wearing no armor and not using a shield, AC = 10 + Dexterity modifier + Wisdom modifier.

evidence.pointer: Monk L1: Unarmored Defense; calculated in equipment.ts

notes: AC calculation is implemented in equipment.ts.

name: Martial Arts
scalingSummary: Martial Arts die: d4 at L1, d6 at L5, d8 at L11, d10 at L17
mechanicalSummary: Use Dexterity instead of Strength for unarmed strikes and monk weapons. Unarmed strikes and monk weapons use Martial Arts die for damage. Can make one unarmed strike as a bonus action when taking the Attack action with an unarmed strike or monk weapon.
notes: Bonus-action unarmed strike is a key Monk feature.
Die scaling is not mechanically tracked in app.

name: Ki
resourceCostSummary: Varies by technique (1 ki for Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, Step of the Wind; 1 for Stunning Strike; etc.)
scalingSummary: Ki points = monk level (2 at L2, scaling to 20 at L20)
mechanicalSummary: Gain a pool of ki points fueling monk techniques. Flurry of Blows (bonus action, 2 unarmed strikes after Attack), Patient Defense (bonus action Dodge), Step of the Wind (bonus action Dash or Disengage, double jump distance).
notes: Ki fuels multiple distinct bonus-action and triggered abilities. Each ki-powered ability would warrant its own row in a full audit.
App uses 'focus points' (2024 terminology) in descriptions but 'Ki' as the feature name.

name: Unarmored Movement
scalingSummary: +10 ft at L2, +15 at L6, +20 at L10, +25 at L14, +30 at L18; wall/water running at L9
mechanicalSummary: Speed increases while unarmored and not using a shield. At L9, can move along vertical surfaces and across liquids on your turn without falling.

evidence.pointer: Monk L2: Unarmored Movement; L9: Unarmored Movement improvement; featureDescriptions

name: Deflect Missiles
trigger: When hit by a ranged weapon attack
resourceCostSummary: No ki cost to reduce damage; 1 ki to throw the missile back
scalingSummary: Damage reduction = 1d10 + Dexterity modifier + monk level
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to reduce damage from a ranged weapon attack by 1d10 + Dex mod + monk level. If damage reduced to 0, can spend 1 ki to catch and throw it back as a monk weapon (ranged attack, 20/60 ft).

name: Slow Fall
scalingSummary: Reduce falling damage by 5 × monk level
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to reduce falling damage by 5 × monk level.

name: Extra Attack
mechanicalSummary: Attack twice when taking the Attack action.

name: Stunning Strike
trigger: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: When you hit with a melee weapon attack, spend 1 ki to force the target to make a Constitution save or be stunned until the end of your next turn.
notes: One of the most impactful monk abilities. Can attempt multiple times per turn.

name: Evasion
mechanicalSummary: Dexterity saves for half damage: take no damage on success, half on failure.

name: Stillness of Mind
mechanicalSummary: Use your action to end one effect on yourself causing you to be charmed or frightened.

evidence.pointer: Monk L7: Stillness of Mind; featureDescriptions

name: Diamond Soul
mechanicalSummary: Gain proficiency in all saving throws. Can spend 1 ki to reroll a failed save (must take new roll).

name: Empty Body
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: Spend 4 ki as an action to become invisible for 1 minute. Also gain resistance to all damage but force. Additionally, can cast astral projection on self only (no ki cost).

name: Perfect Self
trigger: When rolling initiative and having 0 ki points
mechanicalSummary: When you roll initiative and have no ki points remaining, regain 4 ki points.

name: Open Hand Technique (Way of the Open Hand)
trigger: When hitting with a Flurry of Blows attack
resourceCostSummary: Ki already spent for Flurry of Blows
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: When hitting with Flurry of Blows, impose one effect: Dex save or prone, Str save or pushed 15 ft, or target can't take reactions until end of your next turn.

name: Quivering Palm (Way of the Open Hand)
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: Spend 3 ki to set up lethal vibrations in a creature you hit. Can end the vibrations as an action: target makes Con save or drops to 0 HP; on success, takes 10d10 necrotic damage.

name: Shadow Arts (Way of the Shadow)
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: Spend 2 ki to cast darkness, darkvision, pass without trace, or silence, without material components. Also learn the minor illusion cantrip.

name: Shadow Step (Way of the Shadow)
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, teleport up to 60 ft from one dim light/darkness area to another. First melee attack after teleport has advantage.

name: Opportunist (Way of the Shadow)
trigger: When a creature within 5 ft is hit by an attack from someone other than you
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to make a melee attack against that creature.

name: Hand of Healing (Way of Mercy)
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Healing = Martial Arts die + Wisdom modifier
mechanicalSummary: Spend 1 ki to touch a creature and restore HP equal to Martial Arts die + Wisdom modifier. Can replace one Flurry of Blows attack with this at no additional ki cost.

name: Hand of Harm (Way of Mercy)
trigger: When hitting with an unarmed strike (expends ki)
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Damage = Martial Arts die + Wisdom modifier; cannot be reduced
mechanicalSummary: When you hit with an unarmed strike, spend 1 ki to deal extra necrotic damage equal to one roll of your Martial Arts die + Wisdom modifier.

name: Arms of the Astral Self (Way of the Astral Self)
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: Spend 1 ki as a bonus action to summon spectral arms for 10 minutes. Arms have 10 ft reach, use Wisdom for attack/damage, deal force or necrotic damage.

evidence.pointer: way-of-the-astral-self L3: Arms of the Astral Self

name: Redirect Attack (Drunken Master)
trigger: When a creature misses you with a melee attack
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: Spend 1 ki as a reaction to redirect the missed attack to another creature within 5 ft of you.

name: Kensei's Shot (Kensei)
scalingSummary: Damage bonus: 1d4 at L3, 1d6 at L11, 1d8 at L17
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, add 1d4 bonus damage to ranged attacks with kensei weapons until end of turn.

name: Radiant Sun Bolt (Sun Soul)
scalingSummary: Damage = Martial Arts die (radiant); 30 ft range
mechanicalSummary: Make a ranged spell attack (30 ft) dealing radiant damage equal to your Martial Arts die. Can replace any Attack-action attack with this, and can use as a bonus action (as with unarmed strikes).
notes: Functions like a ranged unarmed strike replacement.

name: Searing Sunburst (Sun Soul)
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action, create a burst of light at a point within 150 ft. Each creature in a 20-ft radius makes Con save or takes 2d6 radiant damage per ki point spent (up to 3 ki).

name: Hour of Reaping (Way of Long Death)
mechanicalSummary: As an action, each creature within 30 ft that can see you makes Wisdom save or be frightened until end of your next turn.

name: Mastery of Death (Way of Long Death)
trigger: When reduced to 0 HP and not killed outright
mechanicalSummary: When reduced to 0 HP, spend 1 ki to drop to 1 HP instead.

name: Breath of the Dragon (Ascendant Dragon)
rechargeSummary: Ki recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Damage = 2 rolls of Martial Arts die
mechanicalSummary: When taking the Attack action, replace one attack with a breath weapon (20-ft cone or 30-ft line). Creatures make Dex save or take damage equal to 2 Martial Arts die rolls.

evidence.pointer: way-of-the-ascendant-dragon L3: Breath of the Dragon

name: Wings Unfurled (Ascendant Dragon)
mechanicalSummary: When using Step of the Wind, spectral wings grant fly speed equal to walking speed until end of turn.
